title: DFG build time regression
body:
@gezalore as mentioned elsewhere, #7085 is causing a significant build time slow down for some of our designs.  In one case verilation goes from 17s to 1431s.

When I break into the latter it is always doing something like this:
```
#32 0x000055ee439abbcd in V3DfgBreakCycles::IndependentBits::mask (this=this@entry=0x7ffe5aa1b780, vtx=...) at ../V3DfgBreakCycles.cpp:611
#33 0x000055ee439acb82 in V3DfgBreakCycles::IndependentBits::visit(DfgSel*)::{lambda(DfgVertex const&)#1}::operator()(DfgVertex const&) const (vtx=..., __closure=<optimized out>) at ../V3DfgBreakCycles.cpp:728
#34 V3DfgBreakCycles::IndependentBits::visit (this=0x7ffe5aa1b780, vtxp=0x55ee5c53fa70) at ../V3DfgBreakCycles.cpp:728
#35 0x000055ee439812cc in DfgSel::accept (this=<optimized out>, v=...) at ../V3DfgVertices.h:262
#36 0x000055ee439aef11 in DfgVisitor::iterate (vtxp=0x55ee5c53fa70, this=<optimized out>) at ../V3Dfg.h:389
#37 V3DfgBreakCycles::IndependentBits::IndependentBits(DfgGraph&, DfgUserMap<unsigned long, true> const&)::{lambda(DfgVertex&)#2}::operator()(DfgVertex&) const (__closure=0x7ffe5aa1b540, vtx=...) at ../V3DfgBreakCycles.cpp:930
#38 0x000055ee439af193 in std::__invoke_impl<void, V3DfgBreakCycles::IndependentBits::IndependentBits(DfgGraph&, DfgUserMap<unsigned long, true> const&)::{lambda(DfgVertex&)#2}&, DfgVertex&>(std::__invoke_other, V3DfgBreakCycles::IndependentBits::IndependentBits(DfgGraph&, DfgUserMap<unsigned long, true> const&)::{lambda(DfgVertex&)#2}&, DfgVertex&) (__f=...) at /usr/include/c++/10/bits/invoke.h:59
#39 std::__invoke_r<void, V3DfgBreakCycles::IndependentBits::IndependentBits(DfgGraph&, DfgUserMap<unsigned long, true> const&)::{lambda(DfgVertex&)#2}&, DfgVertex&>(V3DfgBreakCycles::IndependentBits::IndependentBits(DfgGraph&, DfgUserMap<unsigned long, true> const&)::{lambda(DfgVertex&)#2}&, DfgVertex&) (__fn=...) at /usr/include/c++/10/bits/invoke.h:153
#40 std::_Function_handler<void (DfgVertex&), V3DfgBreakCycles::IndependentBits::IndependentBits(DfgGraph&, DfgUserMap<unsigned long, true> const&)::{lambda(DfgVertex&)#2}>::_M_invoke(std::_Any_data const&, DfgVertex&) (__functor=..., __args#0=...) at /usr/include/c++/10/bits/std_function.h:291
#41 0x000055ee43981a66 in std::function<void(DfgVertex&)>::operator() (this=this@entry=0x7ffe5aa1b540, __args#0=...) at /usr/include/c++/10/bits/std_function.h:622
#42 0x000055ee43981b58 in DfgGraph::forEachVertex (this=this@entry=0x55ee5aab67e0, f=...) at ../V3Dfg.h:500
#43 0x000055ee439af465 in V3DfgBreakCycles::IndependentBits::IndependentBits (this=0x7ffe5aa1b780, dfg=..., vtx2Scc=...) at ../V3DfgBreakCycles.cpp:927
#44 0x000055ee439b06a2 in V3DfgBreakCycles::IndependentBits::apply (vtx2Scc=..., dfg=...) at ../V3DfgBreakCycles.cpp:983
#45 V3DfgBreakCycles::FixUp::FixUp (vtx2Scc=..., dfg=..., this=0x7ffe5aa1bac0) at ../V3DfgBreakCycles.cpp:1157
#46 V3DfgBreakCycles::FixUp::apply (dfg=..., vtx2Scc=...) at ../V3DfgBreakCycles.cpp:1164
#47 0x000055ee4399a401 in V3DfgBreakCycles::breakCycles (dfg=..., ctx=...) at ../V3DfgBreakCycles.cpp:1229
#48 0x000055ee4399a997 in V3DfgPasses::breakCycles (dfg=..., ctx=...) at ../V3DfgBreakCycles.cpp:1264
#49 0x000055ee439df020 in DataflowOptimize::optimize (this=this@entry=0x7ffe5aa1c440, dfg=...) at ../V3DfgOptimizer.cpp:335
#50 0x000055ee439df73e in DataflowOptimize::DataflowOptimize (this=0x7ffe5aa1c440, netlistp=0x55ee466c4000, label=...) at ../V3DfgOptimizer.cpp:418
#51 0x000055ee439d7e7e in DataflowOptimize::apply (label=..., netlistp=0x55ee466c4000) at ../V3DfgOptimizer.cpp:429
#52 V3DfgOptimizer::optimize (netlistp=0x55ee466c4000, label=...) at ../V3DfgOptimizer.cpp:435
#53 0x000055ee436a9cc0 in process () at ../V3Global.h:158
#54 0x000055ee436aacfd in verilate (argString=...) at ../Verilator.cpp:733
#55 0x000055ee436ab989 in main (argc=16, argv=0x7ffe5aa1d1c0) at ../Verilator.cpp:888
```

I'll see if I can make any sense of this, but is there any obvious connection between your commit and getting stuck in `breakCycles()`?
